rulings.Case Title: RAY MASCARINAS VS. WILFREDO OSORIO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 22, 2015 Line 1. DEFENDANT WILFREDO OSORIO Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Defendant's Motion to Enforce Settlement and Enter Judgment is continued to August 5, 2015. Defendant shall serve the motion of Plaintiff forthwith. Order Granting Plaintiff's counsel's motion to withdraw filed on June 18, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 270 TURK STREET LLC VS. JULIO COUOH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Consolidated Action Defendants' Nonstatutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 22, 2015 Line 2. PLAINTIFF 270 TURK, LLC, CASE# 541124, VERITAS INVESTMENTSK INC., CASE# 541124, YAT-PANG AU, GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. CASE# 541124 Consolidated Action Defendants' Nonstatutory Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Defendants' Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is GRANTED. Opposition was to be filed on June 18, 2015. Opposition filed on June 19, 2015. Late-filed opposition is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PI COLERIDGE, LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MARITZA OSORIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 22, 2015 Line 3. DEFENDANT MARITZA OSORIO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Defendants Demurrer to the Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff pled sufficient facts to state a cause of action for an Unlawful Detainer, including a relationship supporting unlawful detainer action. Additionally, Notices required under the Ellis Act and SFRO were sufficient. = (501/REQ)
